purpose: Monitor AWS CloudWatch or Azure Monitor metrics for infrastructure health and performance.
description: Queries CloudWatch or Azure Monitor for real-time and historical metrics. Use for: EC2 CPU metrics, RDS memory, alarm status, disk utilization, performance thresholds, health checks. Supports service/region/dimension/tag filtering, threshold conditions (>80, <20), top-N results. Multi-step for multiple metrics or resources.
capabilities: retrieve CloudWatch metrics for any AWS service (EC2, RDS, Lambda, ECS, ELB, etc.)
retrieve Azure Monitor metrics for any Azure resource type
filter metrics by dimensions, tags, region, and resource identifier
evaluate threshold conditions and flag resources exceeding limits
return top-N resources by metric value for capacity planning
context_descriptions: metric name and namespace — CloudWatch metric (e.g. CPUUtilization) or Azure metric (e.g. Percentage CPU)
resource dimensions — instance IDs, DB identifiers, or resource names to scope the query
monitoring duration — time window for metric aggregation (e.g. last 24h, last 7d)
threshold condition — value to compare against with direction (>80, <20)
